interpretations.text: Every deploy, repair, rollback and restore action must preserve one exact release identity and one authorized operator path.
The five-service release unit, employee-network boundaries and Host Provisioner Docker authority must agree across compose, source and runtime checks.
Release construction must bind Git SHA, image digests, configuration hashes, migration head and independently verifiable manifest.
Critical partial destructive effects, crash points, false health, ambiguous outcomes and restart ordering require deterministic failure treatment.
Repair, backup, restore and whole-release rollback must preserve accepted work and refindable proof.
Every terminal or blocked state must be diagnosable, bounded and linked to a safe next action.
WS-09 groundwork measures truthful saturation and fairness for one 64 GiB host and 25-30 employee runtimes; 200-500 is future pressure only.
Release proof, restore proof and saturation state may become reusable trust and support capabilities without promoting acceptance.

templates.instantiation: Map actor, release identity, command, durable state, side effect, terminal state and repair permission.
templates.name: authority-preserving state machine

templates.instantiation: Bind Git SHA, five image digests, compose/config hashes, migration head, secret versions and signed manifest.
templates.name: exact-identity chain

templates.instantiation: Enumerate crash before effect, during effect, after acceptance, after durable receipt and before proof projection.
templates.name: partial-effect ledger

templates.instantiation: Check application, schema, image, config and secret compatibility while preserving accepted work.
templates.name: rollback compatibility envelope

templates.instantiation: Bind backup ID to database, filesystem, secret version, restore result and proof refinding.
templates.name: restore continuity proof

templates.instantiation: Require five services, exact health dependencies, scoped employee networks, bounded egress and Host Provisioner-only Docker authority.
templates.name: topology truth table

templates.instantiation: Every ambiguous, failed, degraded or saturated state names retry permission, blocking reason, evidence and safe next action.
templates.name: operator terminality contract

templates.instantiation: Measure connection, queue, SSE, CPU, memory and noisy-neighbor effects at the 25-30 runtime target.
templates.name: capacity/fairness pressure harness
